reason: Issue 3 spans pipeline.py → instance.py → flex.py:layout_root → diff.py:_paint_initial. The avail_h_mode change ripples through layers; this guide helps verify data flow contracts at each boundary (e.g. instance._resolve_rows still returns the same value, but layout_root interprets it differently).

Issue 1 should reuse existing _HIDE_CURSOR/_SHOW_CURSOR constants and inst.on_exit hook rather than inventing new cursor management. Issue 2 should reuse _build_displayed_line (which already walks visible columns for CJK alignment) instead of hand-splicing cursor_cell + placeholder. Both fixes touch code paths with existing helpers — search before writing.
